name: AI Lead Scraper — ISP Proxy Rotation + OpenAI Scoring

parameters.pythonCode:
import random
import json

# Static ISP proxy pool — rotate per request
PROXY_POOL = [
    {"host": "isp-us-01.proxyfleet.io", "port": 8080, "user": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_USER}}", "pass": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_PASS}}"},
    {"host": "isp-eu-02.proxyfleet.io", "port": 8080, "user": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_USER}}", "pass": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_PASS}}"},
    {"host": "isp-ap-03.proxyfleet.io", "port": 8080, "user": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_USER}}", "pass": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_PASS}}"},
    {"host": "isp-uk-04.proxyfleet.io", "port": 8080, "user": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_USER}}", "pass": "{{$env.ISP_PROXY_PASS}}"}
]

proxy = random.choice(PROXY_POOL)
proxy_url = f"http://{proxy['user']}:{proxy['pass']}@{proxy['host']}:{proxy['port']}"

items = _input.all()
results = []
for item in items:
    body = item.json.get('body', item.json)
    results.append({
        'json': {
            'target_url': body.get('url', ''),
            'company': body.get('company', ''),
            'contact_email': body.get('email', ''),
            'proxy_url': proxy_url,
            'proxy_host': proxy['host'],
            'rotation_id': f"rot-{random.randint(100000, 999999)}"
        }
    })
return results

import re
import json

items = _input.all()
results = []
for item in items:
    html = str(item.json.get('data', item.json.get('body', '')))
    company = item.json.get('company', '')
    email = item.json.get('contact_email', '')
    
  # Extract structured signals
    title_match = re.search(r'<title[^>]*>([^<]+)</title>', html, re.I)
    emails = list(set(re.findall(r'[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.-]+', html)))
    phones = list(set(re.findall(r'\+?[\d\s()-]{10,18}', html)))
    
    results.append({
        'json': {
            'company': company,
            'contact_email': email or (emails[0] if emails else ''),
            'page_title': title_match.group(1).strip() if title_match else '',
            'emails_found': emails[:5],
            'phones_found': phones[:3],
            'proxy_host': item.json.get('proxy_host', ''),
            'html_length': len(html),
            'scrape_status': 'success' if len(html) > 500 else 'partial'
        }
    })
return results

messages.content: You are a B2B lead qualification engine. Score leads 0-100 based on company signals, contact quality, and buying intent. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: score, tier (hot/warm/cold), reasoning, recommended_action.
